name: ai-mirror
description: Free multi-model AI chat mirror (ChatGPT / Gemini / Claude / DeepSeek / Qwen / GLM / Kimi / MiniMax / Doubao / ERNIE / Hugging Face) for users in China. Pure Vercel edge — no server. BYOK + free tiers + optional relay.

scripts.check: node build.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/i18n.js && node --check public/scene3d.js && node --check api/chat.js && node --check api/models.js && node --check api/_providers.js
